---
title: "Alejandra Pachon"
subtitle: "Marketing & Brand Specialist | Graphic Designer | MBA"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandra-pachon-garzon-marketing/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:aleepachon2@gmail.com
    - icon: telephone
      text: "236-268-2203"
---

## About Me

I'm a marketing strategist and brand specialist with a background in graphic design and an MBA. I help companies grow their digital presence through data-informed campaigns, brand strategy, and compelling visual content. With experience across Canada and Latin America, I bring both creative and analytical thinking to every project.

<a href="projects.html" class="hero-cta-btn">View My Work →</a>

<hr class="hero-divider">
